creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm guessing portlint wasn't run on this one.  The COMMENT starts with an indefinite article.  I personally try to avoid double quotes in the COMMENT as well.

secondly -- why is psyco even considered?
From *their own* website: "Psyco is unmaintained and dead. Please look at PyPy for the state-of-the-art in JIT compilers for Python."

I'd get rid of everything touching psyco.
